title: Physiotherapy manipulator machine
abstract: Manipulator is a therapeutic electronic machine can make manipulation or mobilization for large joints and vertebrae's, reduction for dislocated joints and increasing range of motion by stretching spastic muscles. The therapeutic effect of this machine depends on its compressive force, its arms have multidirectional movement and the action box attached with is electronically adjustable. The aim of the Physiotherapy Manipulator machine is to facilitate the treatment of patients and to be used by Physiotherapist instead of manual therapy which cause work related musculoskeletal disorder or injuries for most of them according to many statistics.
claims: Claims Claims The electronic therapeutic Manipulator characterized by: 1- The machine is characterized b * y performing manipulation, mobilization to the large joints, reduction dislocated joint, and stretching spastic muscle. 2- According to claim 1, a handler containing two arms for performing compressive force, each one attached with an action box at the end of the arm, and ' each action box has been programmed separately to the other one. 3- The Manipulator according to claim 1, characterized by control the amount of force, velocity and mode of each arm using the programmed monitor with control button. 4- The Manipulator according to claim 1, characterized by two arms have ball joints each one can rotate 180 degree 5- According to claim 3, the adjustment direction can be linear motion or circular motion. 6- According to claim 3, the machine has two mode, reversible and non reversible. 7- According to claim 3, the adjustment is either one shot or oscillatory. 8- The Manipulator according to claim 2, characterized by multiple spare pacts of head of the Manipulator repaired at the end of the arm, vary in its size and shape, some pieces are rubber concave parts to perform glide, and the other are a hook like ended with a tourniquet to perform traction.
